name: Log4j/Log4Shell Protection
description: Detects and blocks Log4j/Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) exploitation attempts. Covers JNDI injection patterns, obfuscation techniques, and common bypass methods. Critical for any Java-based backend services.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: Log4Shell — JNDI Injection
rules.description: Detects JNDI lookup expressions and Log4j variable syntax used in Log4Shell attacks.

rules.name: Log4Shell — LDAP/RMI Protocols
rules.description: Detects LDAP, RMI, and other protocol URLs commonly used in JNDI injection payloads.

rules.name: Log4Shell — Obfuscated Patterns
rules.description: Detects URL-encoded and nested obfuscation techniques used to bypass WAF filters.

rules.name: Log4Shell — Header Injection
rules.description: Broader pattern to catch Log4j variable lookups in headers like User-Agent, X-Forwarded-For, etc.
